test.observation: 426 tests passed across 19 test suites. 6 component test files auto-formatted with prettier before passing.

typecheck.observation: No typecheck configured for this JavaScript project

lint.observation: 0 errors, 4 warnings (unused vars in existing goalTracker.test.js and progressTracker.test.js — not introduced by this milestone)

format:check.observation: 6 test files were auto-formatted with prettier --write (Dashboard, GoalCard, ModuleDetail, PerformanceCharts, SmartRecommendations, StudyStreak)

nonBlockingIssues.description: Unused setProgressValues helper function (dead code) in test file
VAL-MILESTONES-003 'exactly one next' description mismatches component's broader isNext logic
VAL-GOALCARD-008 doesn't verify post-deletion state transition to no-goal state
VAL-GOALCARD-011 tests expired-goal indirectly via null return rather than direct rendering
Edge case test for delete→no-goal→create has no assertions after delete step
Active class switch test only covers 7-day button, not 90-day or round-trip
Only getRecentPerformance assertion-checked on time range change, not other tracker methods
Inconsistent mock setup pattern in null prediction test from debugging session
VAL-SMARTREC-011 'default cursor' test is effectively untestable since all recommendation types always include a module
Sort order test only checks first child, could verify full ordering
Navigation fallback test doesn't explicitly verify module[0] has progress < 100
VAL-MODDETAIL-013 toast verification only asserts container presence, not toast message text
Uses fireEvent instead of AGENTS.md-recommended userEvent.setup() (matches de facto pattern)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add caveat to userEvent.setup() guidance: 'Note: userEvent.setup() conflicts with jest.useFakeTimers() due to internal async delays. Use fireEvent.click() when fake timers are active.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: SmartRecommendations and ModuleDetail workers encountered userEvent timeout failures when combined with fake timers, switched to fireEvent. All 7 component test files in this mission use fireEvent exclusively despite AGENTS.md recommending userEvent.setup().

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Correct the ToastProvider guidance: SmartRecommendations does not import @/components/ui/toast. Update the list to only include components that actually import it (ModuleDetail, VideoCard — verify others).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: SmartRecommendations.js imports only React, date-fns/format, ProgressTracker, StreakTracker — no toast import. AGENTS.md currently lists it as needing ToastProvider wrapper.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add knowledge entry: Dashboard component has a refreshKey state that increments on mount (useEffect with [] dependency), causing the data-loading useEffect to run twice. Use toHaveBeenLastCalledWith instead of toHaveBeenCalledWith for assertions on mocked dependencies.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test-dashboard worker encountered 3 test failures on first run due to components being called twice, resolved by switching to toHaveBeenLastCalledWith. Dashboard.js lines 29-31 show the pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about Jest mockReturnValue stickiness: calling mockReturnValue() multiple times without jest.clearAllMocks() between them may not reliably override previous values. Always clear mocks before re-setting return values.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test-performanceCharts worker spent 6+ tool calls debugging a null prediction test failure caused by mockReturnValue stickiness. Resolved by adding clearAllMocks() before manual re-setup.

rejectedObservations.observation: features.json test-goalCard expectedBehavior lists 'ToastProvider wrapper needed' — inaccurate
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a feature definition issue in features.json, not a guidance document. The test correctly omitted ToastProvider. Recommend updating features.json but this is orchestrator-level.

rejectedObservations.observation: GoalCard test-worker skill template shows ToastProvider as standard pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: The skill template is correct as a default pattern — workers should determine if ToastProvider is needed per component. The existing note 'Only wrap if component uses toast' is sufficient.

rejectedObservations.observation: ModuleDetail sets/cleans up window.electronAPI.openAnki inline rather than with beforeAll/afterAll
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor style deviation. The inline approach works correctly and is acceptable for isolated test cases. Not worth a guidance change.
